title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PARAGOS COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAMBANG, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO PARAGOS-SAN GABRIEL II COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3657 / 57 OG No. 9, 1560 (February 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2841, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF PARAGOS COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAYAMBANG, PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, TO PARAGOS-SAN GABRIEL II COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Paragos Community School in the Municipality of Bayambang, Province of Pangasinan, is hereby changed to Paragos-San Gabriel II Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
